TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit GRGlInterface extends SkiaSharp.SKObject

Docs.summary: The is used to interface with OpenGL.
Docs.remarks: A does not interact directly with the underlying backend, instead it uses an OpenGL interface.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.GRGlInterface Create ();
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.GRGlInterface Create() cil managed

Docs.summary: Creates a new OpenGL interface for the current platform.
Docs.returns: A new , or if no OpenGL context is available.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.GRGlInterface Create (SkiaSharp.GRGlGetProcedureAddressDelegate get);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.GRGlInterface Create(class SkiaSharp.GRGlGetProcedureAddressDelegate get) cil managed

Docs.param: A delegate that returns the address of an OpenGL function.
Docs.summary: Creates a new OpenGL interface using the specified function resolver.
Docs.returns: A new , or if the interface could not be created.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.GRGlInterface CreateAngle ();
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.GRGlInterface CreateAngle() cil managed

Docs.summary: Creates a new OpenGL interface for ANGLE.
Docs.returns: A new for ANGLE, or if ANGLE is not available.

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.GRGlInterface CreateAngle(class SkiaSharp.GRGlGetProcedureAddressDelegate get) cil managed

Docs.param: A delegate that returns the address of an OpenGL function.
Docs.summary: Creates a new OpenGL interface for ANGLE using the specified function resolver.
Docs.returns: A new for ANGLE, or if the interface could not be created.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.GRGlInterface CreateEvas (IntPtr evas);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.GRGlInterface CreateEvas(native int evas) cil managed

Docs.param: A pointer to the Evas GL context.
Docs.summary: Creates a new OpenGL interface for Tizen Evas.
Docs.returns: A new for Evas, or if the interface could not be created.

Docs.returns: A new for OpenGL ES, or if the interface could not be created.

Docs.param: A delegate that returns the address of an OpenGL function.
Docs.summary: Creates a new desktop OpenGL interface using the specified function resolver.
Docs.returns: A new for desktop OpenGL, or if the interface could not be created.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.GRGlInterface CreateWebGl (SkiaSharp.GRGlGetProcedureAddressDelegate get);

Docs.param: A delegate that returns the address of a WebGL function.
Docs.summary: Creates a new WebGL interface using the specified function resolver.
Docs.returns: A new for WebGL, or if the interface could not be created.

MemberSignature.Value: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);
.method familyhidebysig virtual instance void Dispose(bool disposing) cil managed

Docs.param: to release both managed and unmanaged resources; to release only unmanaged resources.
Docs.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
Docs.remarks: Always dispose the object before you release your last reference to the . Otherwise, the resources it is using will not be freed until the garbage collector calls the finalizer.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool HasExtension (string extension);
.method public hidebysig instance bool HasExtension(string extension) cil managed

Docs.summary: Checks to see if the underlying OpenGL backend has the specified extension.
Docs.returns: if the backend has the extension; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: public bool Validate ();
.method public hidebysig instance bool Validate() cil managed

Docs.summary: Validates that the supports its advertised standard.
Docs.returns: if all the entry points are specified, and any required extensions exist.
